overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a sunlit medieval village with timber-framed houses and a large ancient oak tree, then entering a rustic tavern with candlelit interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: village square dominated by ancient oak tree

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily through the village square, passing the large oak tree and glancing at the timber-framed hall

notable_agents.action: villager in brown tunic walking past the market hall

entered.detail: massive gnarled oak tree with thick trunk and sprawling branches providing shade
half-timbered building with distinctive yellow infill and dark wooden beams
wide stone staircase leading up to a building entrance
irregular cobblestone paving covering the village square ground

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a sunlit medieval village square dominated by a massive ancient oak tree. The timber-framed market hall with yellow patterned walls stands to the left, while villagers move about the cobblestone ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village lane lined with wooden fences and timber houses

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the cobblestone street passing villagers and wooden picket fences

notable_agents.action: villager carrying large wicker basket on back walking toward camera

entered.detail: rustic vertical log fence lining the left side of the path
cluster of medieval half-timbered residences with steep roofs
small dwellings with straw thatched roofs visible down the lane
wooden cart with goods parked beside the fence

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower village lane lined with wooden picket fences. Geralt passes villagers including one carrying a large basket, while timber-framed houses and thatched cottages line the cobblestone path ahead.

events.description: Geralt opens the wooden door and steps inside the thatched cottage, transitioning from outdoor village to indoor tavern

agents.ego_description: approaching the cottage entrance and opening the wooden door to enter

notable_agents.action: child in blue clothing sitting on the ground near the doorway

entered.detail: rustic log cabin with thick straw thatched roof and small windows
heavy wooden plank door with iron hinges serving as the entrance
grassy area with wildflowers beside the cottage wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches a thatched-roof cottage, walking across grass to reach the heavy wooden door. A child sits near the entrance as Geralt opens the door and steps inside, marking the transition from the bright village exterior to the dim interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic tavern interior with candlelit wooden furnishings

events.description: interior shifts from bright sunlight streaming through doorway to warm candlelight illuminating wooden walls

agents.ego_description: walking around the tavern interior, observing bookshelves, tables, and patrons before turning back toward the entrance

notable_agents.action: patron with white hair sitting at wooden table eating

entered.detail: rough-hewn log walls with visible timber construction
planked wooden floorboards worn smooth by use
tall wooden shelves filled with books and bottles
long wooden dining tables with benches
lit candles providing warm flickering illumination
wooden bar with bottles and tankards arranged behind it

segments.scene_description: Inside the candlelit tavern, Geralt explores the rustic interior with rough wooden walls and floors. Bookshelves line the walls, wooden tables fill the space, and a few patrons sit eating by candlelight. The warm artificial lighting contrasts sharply with the bright exterior as Geralt moves through the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sunlit medieval village square into the dim, candlelit interior of a rustic tavern. It begins in an open square dominated by a massive ancient oak tree and a yellow-walled market hall, moving past villagers on the cobblestone ground. As the camera follows Geralt, the scene narrows into a village lane lined with wooden picket fences and thatched cottages before turning toward a specific cottage entrance. The camera then crosses a patch of grass and passes a seated child, transitioning from the brilliant exterior light to the shadows as Geralt opens a heavy wooden door. Finally, the environment shifts into a warm, artificial glow, revealing a tavern interior filled with rough wooden walls, bookshelves, and patrons eating by candlelight.
